Also add an entry to CHANGELOG.md at the top of the Unreleased section, something like "Added incremental backup support for large databases".
truth:

- /home/user/pg-backup-tool/CHANGELOG.md has a line mentioning "incremental backup" (case-insensitive) appearing after the "## [Unreleased]" header and before the "## [2.3.1]" header.

Anti-shortcut guards:
